title: SCP-439, The Bone Hive
description: An insect that turns it's victims into living hives out of their own bones...
body:
The Bone Hive adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-439, also known as the Bone Hive.


This anomaly consists of a parasitic hive system with a central Queen, swarms of Warriors, and the ability to infect living hosts. When a player’s health drops too low or they are weakened, the Queen will infect the victim, beginning a horrifying transformation. The infection progresses through multiple stages, slowly stripping mobility and strength until the host turns new colony. If a colony is destroyed, a new Queen will emerge, ensuring that the Bone Hive can never be fully eradicated.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► What does the SCP-439 Infection do?

The SCP-439 Infection is a new effect given by SCP-439 Queens.

If an SCP-439 Queen attacks a player under certain conditions, the player will be infected if:
> the Player if not burning,
> the Player has weakness,
> the player has less than 5 health points during day,
> the player has less than 12 health points during the night,



Stage 1:

Weakness I

Slowness I

Sweat Particles

Take 1 Damage With 0.01%


Stage 2:

Weakness I

Mining Fatique I

Slowness II

Sweat Particles

Take 1 Damage With 0.01%

Darkness with 0.008% for 3 seconds


Stage 3:

Weakness 100

Slowness 100

Mining Fatique 100

Blindness I

Sweat Particles

Take 4 Damage With 0.08%

Removal of all positive effects


Stage 4:

Death


Die with SCP-439 Infection:

Bone Hive spawns

► Where does SCP-439 spawn?

SCP-439 can spawn on the overworld surface like a normal monster. However, there can only be a few instances of SCP-439.

</details>



![SCP-439](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e797bd521e664e544ed471d4a4c600e5799b88b1.png)

SCP-439 is an insect that resembles the common earwig but in a different color. The main difference between the common earwig and SCP-439 is that SCP-439 infects it's victims. A SCP-439 Queen will seek out to find new victims like players or villagers. If they found a victim, they will attack it and maybe even infect it. If a player has weakness, they will be infected directly. If it's daytime and the players health falls under 5, they will also be infected. If it's nighttime and the players health falls under 12, they will also be infected. If a victim is infected, they will receive other effects like slowness, weakness or taking damage. They also sweat and can even spawn SCP-439 Warriors if being attacked during Stage 2 or 3. They can't move anymore if the infection is on level 3. If a player dies while being infected, they will turn into a Bone Hive. SCP-439 Warrios protect the hive and attack mobs that hurt an infected person or the hive.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
